notes: Bootstrap priority is front-loaded toward one anchor track per uncovered hallmark.
Surveillance priority applies only to tracks that already have a public baseline and no active review bundle.
The queue is a curator planning tool, not a public forecast.

selection_policy.when_request_is_vague: Choose the highest-priority ready track from the queue matching the requested mode.
selection_policy.when_request_is_too_broad: Refuse field-wide scope and decompose to one track.
selection_policy.when_only_hallmark_is_named: Choose the highest-ranked track in that hallmark from the requested mode queue.

stop_after: A first public baseline can be written without pretending the track is deeper than it is.
The pass supports either a no-op, an activity-only update, or one track-level outlook update.
Scope begins to spill beyond one track or intervention family.
The delta window has been checked and either nothing material changed or one bounded update is ready.
The evidence stays in activity-only territory and does not justify outlook movement.
The pass begins to broaden into fresh baseline research and should be handed back to bootstrap instead.

phases.label: Anchor Uncovered Hallmarks
phases.goal: Give each uncovered hallmark one track-level baseline before expanding breadth.

phases.label: Anchor Covered Hallmarks
phases.goal: Fill the first canonical track in hallmarks where coverage started through a different approach.

phases.label: Expand Uncovered Hallmarks
phases.goal: Broaden hallmarks that still need more than one track to avoid a one-track narrative.

phases.label: Expand Covered Hallmarks
phases.goal: Add breadth to hallmarks that already have at least one baseline track.

phases.label: Surveillance Rotation
phases.goal: Revisit established tracks for meaningful deltas without redoing full baseline research.

bootstrap_queue.rationale: Extend a hallmark that already has one public track so the hallmark view does not overfit a single approach.
bootstrap_queue.default_question: What is the current human-relevant evidence landscape for Genome Surveillance and Chromosome Stability, and what belongs in the first public baseline?

surveillance_queue.rationale: This area changes quickly and needs regular sorting of activity versus evidence.
surveillance_queue.default_question: What changed for Microbiome Composition Modulation since the last meaningful review or publication, and does any change justify a public update?
